title: sericocarpus oregonensis subsp. californicus
intro: Sericocarpus oregonensis subsp. californicus, also known as California woolly aster or California desert aster, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support digestive health and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
